archetype.name: Unexpected Sharpshooter
archetype.note: This archetype offers Hit the Dirt! at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Hit the Dirt!
feat.text: You fling yourself out of harm's way. You Leap. Your movement gives you a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. Regardless of whether or not the triggering attack hits, you land prone after completing your Leap.

traits.name: Gunslinger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the gunslinger class.

feat.trigger: A creature you can see attempts a ranged Strike against you.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
